title: bridge-matrix: AS handler drops events when channel is full with no log or retry
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs as_transaction handler uses try_send to forward events to the bridge loop channel (capacity 64). When the channel is full, events are silently dropped (let _ = state.tx.try_send(event)). The homeserver receives HTTP 200 OK and considers the transaction delivered; the bridge never processes those messages. Trigger: burst of >64 Matrix room messages while the bridge loop is busy sending to nie relay. Note: nie-14sh.56 (channel capacity drop with no log) is a duplicate filing for the same symptom — this adds the correctness framing.
